mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_records (job_id, resume_id, total_score, skill_score, experience_score, education_score, salary_score, match_summary, status, created_at) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{resumeId}, #{totalScore}, #{skillScore}, #{experienceScore}, #{educationScore}, #{salaryScore}, #{matchSummary}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, job_id, resume_id, total_score, skill_score, experience_score, education_score, salary_score, match_summary, status, created_at FROM match_records WHERE job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY total_score DESC

SELECT a.id AS applicationId, r.id AS resumeId, r.user_id AS userId, r.name AS name, r.character_avatar AS avatar, r.max_education AS maxEducation, mr.id AS matchId, mr.total_score AS totalScore, mr.skill_score AS skillScore, mr.experience_score AS experienceScore, mr.education_score AS educationScore, mr.salary_score AS salaryScore, mr.match_summary AS matchSummary, mr.status AS status FROM applications a INNER JOIN resumes r ON a.resume_id = r.id LEFT JOIN match_records mr ON mr.job_id = a.job_id AND mr.resume_id = a.resume_id WHERE a.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY mr.total_score DESC, a.applied_at DESC
SELECT id, job_id, resume_id, total_score, skill_score, experience_score, education_score, salary_score, match_summary, status, created_at FROM match_records WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE match_records SET match_summary = #{summary} WHERE id = #{id}
